projects.title: Dataset Quality Analyzer
projects.subtitle: EDA tool
projects.description: An AI-powered exploratory data analysis tool that automatically profiles datasets, detects anomalies, missing values, and generates visual insights. Built with a FastAPI backend and Streamlit frontend, backed by Supabase for storage and Groq for AI-generated summaries.

projects.title: Sentinel-RAG based ASM System
projects.subtitle: ASM system
projects.description: A RAG based ASM system that monitors all your digital assets
